title: MMT’s Niter
body:
Monolith Modding Team: Niter

This mod focuses on Niter, a new resource found in the world!

Added Features ->

Items: Niter, Dynamite, Dubious Stew
Blocks: Niter Block, Niter Ore, Limestone(+stairs&slabs), Chiseled Limestone, Crumbled Limestone, Hardened Glass, Polished Hardened Glass(+stairs&slabs)

Other:

Niter can be used as a fuel source and composting
Niter can be used to craft gunpowder
Niter can be used to craft light gray dye
Niter can be used to cure rotten flesh, poisonous potatoes and suspisous stew.

Dynamite is a throwable explosive

Niter Ore will generate inside of granite blocks
Limestone will ONLY generate in meadows.

Crumbled Limestone falls if stepped on.

Added Niter related trades to wandering trader and villagers.



_This mod was originaly a part of vanillish but was later forked and turned into easy niter!
The vanillish mod_id is still present._
